allowed: Public repository files and commit metadata
Abstracted decision records that contain no private chat, health, credential, or identifying personal content
forbidden: Credentials, tokens, account identifiers, or private contact data

records.title: Five autonomous teams share one durable state
records.summary: The repository defines five active teams and requires each to read shared state, update only owned records, and leave evidence plus a peer trigger request.
records.falsification_or_review_route: Re-read CURRENT_STATE.json at the indexed blob SHA and compare the operating_model, teams, and coordination_rule fields.

records.title: Public repositories must exclude private chat and health material
records.summary: Continuity artifacts may reference private-source categories abstractly but must not reproduce private chat or health content into the public repository.
records.falsification_or_review_route: Inspect hard_boundaries in CURRENT_STATE.json; reject this record if the boundary is absent or materially changed.

records.title: M-001 provenance-preserving continuity index
records.summary: The highest-priority continuity task requires an index schema, explicit source boundaries, and initial indexed records.
records.falsification_or_review_route: Re-read ACTIVE_QUEUE.json at the indexed blob SHA and verify item M-001 owner, priority, action, and required_evidence.

records.title: Specialists require distinct reusable responsibility
records.summary: A specialist can be added only when responsibility, interface, owner, acceptance test, and reusable output are distinct; duplicate or nonproductive roles are retired under the registry rule.
records.falsification_or_review_route: Compare this summary with the registry rule and retirement_rule at the indexed blob SHA.

records.title: No durable peer-trigger requests were pending at observation time
records.summary: The trigger request array was empty when inspected. This does not prove peers ran; it only records absence of durable pending requests at that blob.
records.falsification_or_review_route: Re-read the exact blob and verify requests is an empty array; later nonempty versions supersede only the temporal observation, not the historical record.
